home.title: Nordiska Mark, Bygg & Design AB — Paving, garden design & groundworks | nmbd.se
home.description: Nordiska Mark, Bygg & Design AB creates sustainable outdoor spaces with paving, masonry, garden design and groundworks in Saltsjö-Boo, Värmdö and the Stockholm area. Free quote. 30% ROT deduction.

contact.title: Contact — Nordiska Mark, Bygg & Design AB | nmbd.se
contact.description: Contact NMBD for a free quote and advice on paving, garden design, masonry and outdoor projects in Saltsjö-Boo and Värmdö.

home.title: Creating beautiful outdoor spaces.
home.lede: Paving, garden design, masonry and full renovation for homes and businesses.
home.serviceOneBody: Durable, beautiful stone surfaces for paths, patios and driveways.
home.serviceTwoBody: Harmonious gardens with Nordic aesthetics and function.
home.serviceThreeBody: End-to-end outdoor projects from planning to completion.

contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.lede: Fill in the form or email us directly — we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

hero.headline: Beautiful outdoor spaces, built to last.
hero.tagline: Paving, masonry, garden design and groundwork. Designed and built across the Stockholm area.

services.heading: Our services
services.intro: From the first dig to the final stone. We handle every part of your outdoor space.

1.title: Paving
1.description: Artful stone paving for paths and patios. Beautiful and built to last.

2.title: Concrete slabs
2.description: Hard-wearing concrete slabs, laid with precision for surfaces that last for generations.

3.title: Garden design
3.description: Harmonious, functional gardens designed with Nordic simplicity.

4.title: Masonry
4.description: Natural stone walls that pair function with timeless elegance.

5.title: Full renovation
5.description: We turn tired outdoor spaces into modern landscapes, from idea to finish.

6.title: Other services
6.description: Drainage, planting and everything in between. We handle the rest.

expertise.subtitle: CREATING BEAUTIFUL OUTDOOR SPACES
expertise.title: Expert solutions for every need
expertise.description: At <0>Nordiska Mark, Bygg & Design AB</0> we create sustainable and aesthetically pleasing outdoor environments for both private clients and businesses. With expertise in<1> paving, masonry, garden design and groundworks</1> we transform your patio, driveway or garden into something unique and functional.
expertise.imageAlt: Professionally laid garden path with stone paving

1.title: Professional paving
1.body: Beautiful walkways, terraces and driveways with high-quality materials.

2.title: Masonry & natural stone work
2.body: Solid, stylish walls, facades and details built to last.

3.title: Garden design & maintenance
3.body: We create and care for green spaces for a harmonious, welcoming outdoor environment.

4.title: Groundworks & drainage
4.body: Sustainable ground solutions that ensure a stable foundation for every project.
